$ /opt/conda/bin/python /home/jovyan/LLMOnto/Benchmark/OntologyConceptMatching/maseo_code/maseo/cqbycq/cli.py --config /home/jovyan/LLMOnto/Benchmark/OntologyConceptMatching/maseo_code/maseo/cqbycq/dataset/.run_config.yaml --cqs_file /home/jovyan/LLMOnto/Benchmark/OntologyConceptMatching/maseo_code/maseo/cqbycq/dataset/cqs/swo_cq2onto_cqs.json --save_file /home/jovyan/LLMOnto/Benchmark/OntologyConceptMatching/maseo_code/maseo/cqbycq/dataset/cqbycq/deepseek_deepseek-v3.2/ontology/swo_cq2onto_cqbycq_ontology.owl

======================================================================
[1/35] CQ04: Which of the named and published algorithms does this tool use?
======================================================================
<?xml version="1.0"?>
<rdf:RDF xml:base="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"
         xmlns:owl="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#"
         xmlns:rdf="http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#"
         xmlns:rdfs="http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#"
         xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#">

  <owl:Ontology rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"/>

  <!-- owl:Class declarations -->

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software tool or application that performs some function.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A named and published computational procedure or formula for solving a problem.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

  <!-- owl:ObjectProperty declarations -->

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#usesAlgorithm">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a tool to an algorithm that it employs in its operation.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">uses algorithm</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

</rdf:RDF>

</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#isModificationOf">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates an algorithm modification to the base algorithm it is derived from.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">is modification of</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmModification"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm"/>

======================================================================
[7/35] CQ14: Does it do what I want or need it to do e.g. render a gif?
======================================================================
<?xml version="1.0"?>
<rdf:RDF xml:base="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"
         xmlns:owl="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#"
         xmlns:rdf="http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#"
         xmlns:rdfs="http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#"
         xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#">

  <owl:Ontology rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"/>

  <!-- owl:Class declarations -->

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool">

</owl:Class>

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm Modification</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific functionality or capability that a software tool can provide.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Feature</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Software Type</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific activity or operation that a software tool can perform.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Task</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#WebService">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software type where the tool is deployed and accessible as a service over the web.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Web Service</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType'/>
</owl:Class>

  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A requirement or desire of a user for a software tool to perform a certain task.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">User Need</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A relationship capturing that a specific tool satisfies a user's need for a particular task.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Satisfaction</rdfs:label>

  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Feature"/>

  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task"/>

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">satisfies need</rdfs:label>

  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#UserNeed"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">satisfied by tool</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolSatisfaction"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#forTask">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a tool satisfaction instance to the specific task that is needed and performed.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">for task</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolSatisfaction"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

[9/35] CQ16: What software can I use my data with to support my task?

</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#canUseData">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a software tool to a type of data artifact that it is capable of using as input or processing.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">can use data</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Data"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#usesData">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a data tool usage instance to the specific data artifact being used.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">uses data</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataToolUsage"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Data"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#usesTool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a data tool usage instance to the software tool being used.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">uses tool</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataToolUsage"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#supportsTask">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a data tool usage instance to the task that the usage supports.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">supports task</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataToolUsage"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

[10/35] CQ17: What are the input and output formats for this software?
======================================================================
<?xml version="1.0"?>
<rdf:RDF xml:base="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"
         xmlns:owl="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#"
         xmlns:rdf="http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#"
         xmlns:rdfs="http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#"
         xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#">

  <owl:Ontology rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"/>

  <!-- owl:Class declarations -->

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software tool or application that performs some function.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A named and published computational procedure or formula for solving a problem.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmModification">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific version or modification of an algorithm, capturing changes over time.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm Modification</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Feature">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific functionality or capability that a software tool can provide.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Feature</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A category describing the form or deployment of a software tool, such as API, Desktop application, Web application, or Library.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Software Type</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific activity or operation that a software tool can perform.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Task</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#WebService">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software type where the tool is deployed and accessible as a service over the web.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Web Service</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#UserNeed">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A requirement or desire of a user for a software tool to perform a certain task.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">User Need</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolSatisfaction">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A relationship capturing that a specific tool satisfies a user's need for a particular task.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Satisfaction</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Data">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A digital artifact or information produced or generated by a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Data</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataToolUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific instance of using a particular data artifact with a software tool to support a task.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Data Tool Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific structure or encoding standard for digital data, such as CSV, JSON, or FASTA.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Data'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolFormatSpecification">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specification that a particular software tool can accept or produce a data format, indicating whether it is for input or output.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Format Specification</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

  <!-- owl:ObjectProperty declarations -->

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#usesAlgorithm">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a tool to an algorithm that it employs in its operation.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">uses algorithm</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm"/>

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">uses modification</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmModification"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates an algorithm modification to the base algorithm it is derived from.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">is modification of</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmModification"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm"/>

  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Feature"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasSoftwareType">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has software type</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#performsTask">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a software tool to a task that it can perform.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">performs task</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#satisfiesNeed">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">satisfies need</rdfs:label>

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">for task</rdfs:label>

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">specifies tool</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolFormatSpecification"/>

  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

  <!-- owl:DatatypeProperty declarations -->

<owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#isInputFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Indicates whether the format specification is for an input format (true) or an output format (false).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">is input format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolFormatSpecification"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#xsd:boolean"/>
  <rdf:type rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#FunctionalProperty"/>
</owl:DatatypeProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#specifiesTool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a tool format specification to the software tool it describes.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">specifies tool</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolFormatSpecification"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#specifiesFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a tool format specification to the data format that is specified.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">specifies format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolFormatSpecification"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

  <!-- owl:DatatypeProperty declarations -->

<owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#isInputFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Indicates whether the format specification is for an input format (true) or an output format (false).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">is input format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolFormatSpecification"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#xsd:boolean"/>
  <rdf:type rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#FunctionalProperty"/>
</owl:DatatypeProperty>

</rdf:RDF>

</owl:ObjectProperty>

</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasSoftwareType">

</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasValidInputFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a software tool directly to a data format that is a valid input for that tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has valid input format</rdfs:label>

</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#isValidInputFormatFor">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a data format to a software tool for which it is a valid input.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">is valid input format for</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <owl:inverseOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasValidInputFormat'/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasExportCapability">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a software tool to an export capability that it possesses.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has export capability</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ExportCapability"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasSourceFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates an export capability to the data format from which data is exported.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has source format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ExportCapability"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasTargetFormat">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has target format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ExportCapability"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#isInputFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Indicates whether the format specification is for an input format (true) or an output format (false).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">is input format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolFormatSpecification"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#xsd:boolean"/>
  <rdf:type rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#FunctionalProperty"/>
</owl:DatatypeProperty>

======================================================================
[14/35] CQ23: Can software A work with data that are output from software B?
======================================================================

<rdf:RDF xml:base="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"
         xmlns:owl="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#"

  <owl:Ontology rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"/>

  <!-- owl:Class declarations -->

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software tool or application that performs some function.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A named and published computational procedure or formula for solving a problem.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmModification">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific version or modification of an algorithm, capturing changes over time.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm Modification</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Feature">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific functionality or capability that a software tool can provide.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Feature</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A category describing the form or deployment of a software tool, such as API, Desktop application, Web application, or Library.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Software Type</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific activity or operation that a software tool can perform.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Task</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#WebService">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software type where the tool is deployed and accessible as a service over the web.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Web Service</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#UserNeed">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A requirement or desire of a user for a software tool to perform a certain task.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">User Need</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolSatisfaction">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A relationship capturing that a specific tool satisfies a user's need for a particular task.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Satisfaction</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Data">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A digital artifact or information produced or generated by a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Data</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataToolUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific instance of using a particular data artifact with a software tool to support a task.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Data Tool Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific structure or encoding standard for digital data, such as CSV, JSON, or FASTA.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Data'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolFormatSpecification">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specification that a particular software tool can accept or produce a data format, indicating whether it is for input or output.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Format Specification</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#CELFormat">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">.cel file</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#OpenFormat">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Open Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format'/>

  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <owl:inverseOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasValidInputFormat'/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasExportCapability">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a software tool to an export capability that it possesses.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has export capability</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ExportCapability"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasSourceFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates an export capability to the data format from which data is exported.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has source format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ExportCapability"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasTargetFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates an export capability to the data format to which data is exported.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has target format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ExportCapability"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#isOutputOf">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a data artifact to the software tool that produced it as output. This is the inverse of createdBy.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">is output of</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Data"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <owl:inverseOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#createdBy'/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#worksWithOutputFrom">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a software tool A to a software tool B if A can work with data that are output from B. This property answers competency question CQ23.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">works with output from</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <owl:propertyChainAxiom rdf:parseType='Collection'><rdf:Description rdf:about='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#canUseData'/><rdf:Description rdf:about='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#isOutputOf'/></owl:propertyChainAxiom>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a data artifact to the specific format in which it is encoded.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Data"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

  <!-- owl:DatatypeProperty declarations -->

<owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#isInputFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Indicates whether the format specification is for an input format (true) or an output format (false).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">is input format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolFormatSpecification"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#xsd:boolean"/>
  <rdf:type rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#FunctionalProperty"/>
</owl:DatatypeProperty>

</rdf:RDF>

</owl:Class>

</owl:Class>

======================================================================
[16/35] CQ29: Given input x, what are the data exports for this version?
======================================================================

<rdf:RDF xml:base="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"
         xmlns:owl="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#"

  <owl:Ontology rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"/>

  <!-- owl:Class declarations -->

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software tool or application that performs some function.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A named and published computational procedure or formula for solving a problem.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmModification">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific version or modification of an algorithm, capturing changes over time.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm Modification</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Feature">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific functionality or capability that a software tool can provide.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Feature</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A category describing the form or deployment of a software tool, such as API, Desktop application, Web application, or Library.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Software Type</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific activity or operation that a software tool can perform.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Task</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#WebService">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software type where the tool is deployed and accessible as a service over the web.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Web Service</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#UserNeed">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A requirement or desire of a user for a software tool to perform a certain task.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">User Need</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolSatisfaction">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A relationship capturing that a specific tool satisfies a user's need for a particular task.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Satisfaction</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Data">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A digital artifact or information produced or generated by a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Data</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataToolUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific instance of using a particular data artifact with a software tool to support a task.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Data Tool Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific structure or encoding standard for digital data, such as CSV, JSON, or FASTA.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Data'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolFormatSpecification">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specification that a particular software tool can accept or produce a data format, indicating whether it is for input or output.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Format Specification</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#CELFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The .cel file format, a specific data format used for microarray data.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">.cel file</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#OpenFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A data format that is openly documented, non-proprietary, and widely accessible, such as CSV or TXT.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Open Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#CSVFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The Comma-Separated Values (CSV) file format, a common open format for tabular data.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">CSV Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#OpenFormat'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#TXTFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The plain text (TXT) file format, a common open format for unstructured text data.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">TXT Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#OpenFormat'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ProprietaryFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A data format that is owned and controlled by a specific entity, often with restricted documentation or usage.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Proprietary Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ExportCapability">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A capability of a software tool to export data from a specific source format to a specific target format.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Export Capability</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersion">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific version or release of a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Version</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#usesAlgorithm">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a tool to an algorithm that it employs in its operation.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">uses algorithm</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#usesModification">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a tool to a specific modification of an algorithm that it employs.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">uses modification</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmModification"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#isModificationOf">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates an algorithm modification to the base algorithm it is derived from.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">is modification of</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmModification"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has feature</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Feature"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasSoftwareType">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a tool to its software type, such as API or Desktop application.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has software type</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#performsTask">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a software tool to a task that it can perform.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">performs task</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#satisfiesNeed">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a tool satisfaction instance to the user need it addresses.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">satisfies need</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolSatisfaction"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#UserNeed"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#satisfiedByTool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a tool satisfaction instance to the tool that provides the satisfaction.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">satisfied by tool</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolSatisfaction"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#forTask">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a tool satisfaction instance to the specific task that is needed and performed.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">for task</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolSatisfaction"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#createdBy">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a data artifact to the software tool that created or generated it.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">created by</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Data"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#canUseData">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a software tool to a type of data artifact that it is capable of using as input or processing.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">can use data</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Data"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#usesData">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a data tool usage instance to the specific data artifact being used.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">uses data</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataToolUsage"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Data"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#usesTool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a data tool usage instance to the software tool being used.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">uses tool</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataToolUsage"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#supportsTask">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a data tool usage instance to the task that the usage supports.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">supports task</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataToolUsage"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#specifiesTool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a tool format specification to the software tool it describes.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">specifies tool</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolFormatSpecification"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#specifiesFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a tool format specification to the data format that is specified.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">specifies format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolFormatSpecification"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasValidInputFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a software tool directly to a data format that is a valid input for that tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has valid input format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format"/>
  <rdfs:subPropertyOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#canUseData'/><owl:propertyChainAxiom rdf:parseType='Collection'><rdf:Description rdf:about='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#specifiesTool'/><rdf:Description rdf:about='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#specifiesFormat'/></owl:propertyChainAxiom>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#isValidInputFormatFor">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a data format to a software tool for which it is a valid input.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">is valid input format for</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <owl:inverseOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasValidInputFormat'/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasExportCapability">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a software tool to an export capability that it possesses.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has export capability</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ExportCapability"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasSourceFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates an export capability to the data format from which data is exported.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has source format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ExportCapability"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasTargetFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates an export capability to the data format to which data is exported.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has target format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ExportCapability"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#isOutputOf">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a data artifact to the software tool that produced it as output. This is the inverse of createdBy.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">is output of</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Data"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <owl:inverseOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#createdBy'/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#worksWithOutputFrom">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a software tool A to a software tool B if A can work with data that are output from B. This property answers competency question CQ23.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">works with output from</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <owl:propertyChainAxiom rdf:parseType='Collection'><rdf:Description rdf:about='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#canUseData'/><rdf:Description rdf:about='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#isOutputOf'/></owl:propertyChainAxiom>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a data artifact to the specific format in which it is encoded.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Data"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

  <!-- owl:DatatypeProperty declarations -->

<owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#isInputFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Indicates whether the format specification is for an input format (true) or an output format (false).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">is input format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolFormatSpecification"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#xsd:boolean"/>
  <rdf:type rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#FunctionalProperty"/>
</owl:DatatypeProperty>

<owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#isOpenSource">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Indicates whether the software tool is open source (true) or not (false).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">is open source</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#xsd:boolean"/>
</owl:DatatypeProperty>

<owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#isMaintained">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Indicates whether the software tool is actively maintained (true) or not (false).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">is maintained</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#xsd:boolean"/>
</owl:DatatypeProperty>

[17/35] CQ30: Where can I get the software?
======================================================================

  <owl:Ontology rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"/>

  <!-- owl:Class declarations -->

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software tool or application that performs some function.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A named and published computational procedure or formula for solving a problem.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmModification">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific version or modification of an algorithm, capturing changes over time.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm Modification</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Feature">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific functionality or capability that a software tool can provide.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Feature</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A category describing the form or deployment of a software tool, such as API, Desktop application, Web application, or Library.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Software Type</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific activity or operation that a software tool can perform.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Task</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#WebService">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software type where the tool is deployed and accessible as a service over the web.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Web Service</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#UserNeed">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A requirement or desire of a user for a software tool to perform a certain task.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">User Need</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolSatisfaction">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A relationship capturing that a specific tool satisfies a user's need for a particular task.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Satisfaction</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Data">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A digital artifact or information produced or generated by a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Data</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataToolUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific instance of using a particular data artifact with a software tool to support a task.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Data Tool Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific structure or encoding standard for digital data, such as CSV, JSON, or FASTA.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Data'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolFormatSpecification">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specification that a particular software tool can accept or produce a data format, indicating whether it is for input or output.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Format Specification</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#CELFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The .cel file format, a specific data format used for microarray data.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">.cel file</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#OpenFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A data format that is openly documented, non-proprietary, and widely accessible, such as CSV or TXT.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Open Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#CSVFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The Comma-Separated Values (CSV) file format, a common open format for tabular data.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">CSV Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#OpenFormat'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#TXTFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The plain text (TXT) file format, a common open format for unstructured text data.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">TXT Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#OpenFormat'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ProprietaryFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A data format that is owned and controlled by a specific entity, often with restricted documentation or usage.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Proprietary Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ExportCapability">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A capability of a software tool to export data from a specific source format to a specific target format.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Export Capability</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersion">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific version or release of a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Version</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool'/>
</owl:Class>

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">specifies format</rdfs:label>

  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasValidInputFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a software tool directly to a data format that is a valid input for that tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has valid input format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format"/>
  <rdfs:subPropertyOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#canUseData'/><owl:propertyChainAxiom rdf:parseType='Collection'><rdf:Description rdf:about='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#specifiesTool'/><rdf:Description rdf:about='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#specifiesFormat'/></owl:propertyChainAxiom>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#isValidInputFormatFor">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a data format to a software tool for which it is a valid input.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">is valid input format for</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <owl:inverseOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasValidInputFormat'/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasExportCapability">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a software tool to an export capability that it possesses.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has export capability</rdfs:label>

  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ExportCapability"/>

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has source format</rdfs:label>

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has target format</rdfs:label>

  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#isOutputOf">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a data artifact to the software tool that produced it as output. This is the inverse of createdBy.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">is output of</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Data"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <owl:inverseOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#createdBy'/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#worksWithOutputFrom">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a software tool A to a software tool B if A can work with data that are output from B. This property answers competency question CQ23.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">works with output from</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <owl:propertyChainAxiom rdf:parseType='Collection'><rdf:Description rdf:about='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#canUseData'/><rdf:Description rdf:about='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#isOutputOf'/></owl:propertyChainAxiom>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a data artifact to the specific format in which it is encoded.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Data"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

  <!-- owl:DatatypeProperty declarations -->

<owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#isInputFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Indicates whether the format specification is for an input format (true) or an output format (false).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">is input format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolFormatSpecification"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#xsd:boolean"/>
  <rdf:type rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#FunctionalProperty"/>
</owl:DatatypeProperty>

<owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#isOpenSource">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Indicates whether the software tool is open source (true) or not (false).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">is open source</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#xsd:boolean"/>
</owl:DatatypeProperty>

<owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#isMaintained">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Indicates whether the software tool is actively maintained (true) or not (false).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">is maintained</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#xsd:boolean"/>
</owl:DatatypeProperty>

<owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasDistributionLocation">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Provides a URL or other location identifier where the software tool can be obtained or downloaded.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has distribution location</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#xsd:anyURI"/>
</owl:DatatypeProperty>

[18/35] CQ32: How do I get help?
======================================================================

         xmlns:owl="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#"
         xmlns:rdf="http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#"
         xmlns:rdfs="http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#"
         xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#">

  <owl:Ontology rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"/>

  <!-- owl:Class declarations -->

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software tool or application that performs some function.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A named and published computational procedure or formula for solving a problem.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmModification">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific version or modification of an algorithm, capturing changes over time.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm Modification</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Feature">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific functionality or capability that a software tool can provide.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Feature</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A category describing the form or deployment of a software tool, such as API, Desktop application, Web application, or Library.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Software Type</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific activity or operation that a software tool can perform.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Task</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#WebService">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software type where the tool is deployed and accessible as a service over the web.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Web Service</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#UserNeed">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A requirement or desire of a user for a software tool to perform a certain task.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">User Need</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolSatisfaction">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A relationship capturing that a specific tool satisfies a user's need for a particular task.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Satisfaction</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Data">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A digital artifact or information produced or generated by a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Data</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataToolUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific instance of using a particular data artifact with a software tool to support a task.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Data Tool Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific structure or encoding standard for digital data, such as CSV, JSON, or FASTA.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Data'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolFormatSpecification">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specification that a particular software tool can accept or produce a data format, indicating whether it is for input or output.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Format Specification</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#CELFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The .cel file format, a specific data format used for microarray data.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">.cel file</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#OpenFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A data format that is openly documented, non-proprietary, and widely accessible, such as CSV or TXT.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Open Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#CSVFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The Comma-Separated Values (CSV) file format, a common open format for tabular data.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">CSV Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#OpenFormat'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#TXTFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The plain text (TXT) file format, a common open format for unstructured text data.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">TXT Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#OpenFormat'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ProprietaryFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A data format that is owned and controlled by a specific entity, often with restricted documentation or usage.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Proprietary Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ExportCapability">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A capability of a software tool to export data from a specific source format to a specific target format.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Export Capability</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersion">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific version or release of a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Version</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#HelpResource">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A resource that provides help, support, or documentation for a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Help Resource</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Documentation">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A type of help resource that provides written instructions, manuals, or guides for a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Documentation</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#HelpResource'/>
</owl:Class>

  <!-- owl:ObjectProperty declarations -->

  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format"/>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasValidInputFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a software tool directly to a data format that is a valid input for that tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has valid input format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format"/>
  <rdfs:subPropertyOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#canUseData'/><owl:propertyChainAxiom rdf:parseType='Collection'><rdf:Description rdf:about='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#specifiesTool'/><rdf:Description rdf:about='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#specifiesFormat'/></owl:propertyChainAxiom>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#isValidInputFormatFor">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a data format to a software tool for which it is a valid input.</rdfs:comment>

  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <owl:inverseOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasValidInputFormat'/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#worksWithOutputFrom">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a software tool A to a software tool B if A can work with data that are output from B. This property answers competency question CQ23.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">works with output from</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>

</owl:ObjectProperty>

[19/35] CQ36: Who developed it?
======================================================================

  <!-- owl:Class declarations -->

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software tool or application that performs some function.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A named and published computational procedure or formula for solving a problem.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmModification">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific version or modification of an algorithm, capturing changes over time.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm Modification</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Feature">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific functionality or capability that a software tool can provide.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Feature</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A category describing the form or deployment of a software tool, such as API, Desktop application, Web application, or Library.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Software Type</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific activity or operation that a software tool can perform.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Task</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#WebService">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software type where the tool is deployed and accessible as a service over the web.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Web Service</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#UserNeed">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A requirement or desire of a user for a software tool to perform a certain task.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">User Need</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolSatisfaction">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A relationship capturing that a specific tool satisfies a user's need for a particular task.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Satisfaction</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Data">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A digital artifact or information produced or generated by a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Data</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataToolUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific instance of using a particular data artifact with a software tool to support a task.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Data Tool Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific structure or encoding standard for digital data, such as CSV, JSON, or FASTA.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Data'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolFormatSpecification">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specification that a particular software tool can accept or produce a data format, indicating whether it is for input or output.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Format Specification</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#CELFormat">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">.cel file</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#OpenFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A data format that is openly documented, non-proprietary, and widely accessible, such as CSV or TXT.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Open Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#CSVFormat">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Proprietary Format</rdfs:label>

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Developer</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

  <!-- owl:ObjectProperty declarations -->

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#usesAlgorithm">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a tool to an algorithm that it employs in its operation.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">uses algorithm</rdfs:label>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#usesModification">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a tool to a specific modification of an algorithm that it employs.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">uses modification</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmModification"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

======================================================================
[20/35] CQ37: What is the homepage of the software?
======================================================================

</owl:Class>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#isModificationOf">

[21/35] CQ38: Can we collaborate with developers of software x?
======================================================================

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#usesModification">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a tool to a specific modification of an algorithm that it employs.</rdfs:comment>
