[22/35] CQ40: Which URL can I get it from?
======================================================================
<?xml version="1.0"?>
<rdf:RDF xml:base="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"
         xmlns:owl="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#"
         xmlns:rdf="http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#"
         xmlns:rdfs="http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#"
         xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#">

  <owl:Ontology rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"/>

  <!-- owl:Class declarations -->

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software tool or application that performs some function.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A named and published computational procedure or formula for solving a problem.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmModification">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific version or modification of an algorithm, capturing changes over time.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm Modification</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Feature">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific functionality or capability that a software tool can provide.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Feature</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A category describing the form or deployment of a software tool, such as API, Desktop application, Web application, or Library.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Software Type</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific activity or operation that a software tool can perform.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Task</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#WebService">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software type where the tool is deployed and accessible as a service over the web.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Web Service</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#UserNeed">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A requirement or desire of a user for a software tool to perform a certain task.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">User Need</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolSatisfaction">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A relationship capturing that a specific tool satisfies a user's need for a particular task.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Satisfaction</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Data">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A digital artifact or information produced or generated by a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Data</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataToolUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific instance of using a particular data artifact with a software tool to support a task.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Data Tool Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific structure or encoding standard for digital data, such as CSV, JSON, or FASTA.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Data'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolFormatSpecification">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specification that a particular software tool can accept or produce a data format, indicating whether it is for input or output.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Format Specification</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#CELFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The .cel file format, a specific data format used for microarray data.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">.cel file</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#OpenFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A data format that is openly documented, non-proprietary, and widely accessible, such as CSV or TXT.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Open Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#CSVFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The Comma-Separated Values (CSV) file format, a common open format for tabular data.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">CSV Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#OpenFormat'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#TXTFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The plain text (TXT) file format, a common open format for unstructured text data.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">TXT Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#OpenFormat'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ProprietaryFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A data format that is owned and controlled by a specific entity, often with restricted documentation or usage.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Proprietary Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ExportCapability">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A capability of a software tool to export data from a specific source format to a specific target format.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Export Capability</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersion">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific version or release of a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Version</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#HelpResource">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Help Resource</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Documentation">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Documentation</rdfs:label>

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Developer</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Collaboration</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

======================================================================
[23/35] CQ45: How long has this software been around?
======================================================================

         xmlns:owl="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#"
         xmlns:rdf="http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#"

  <owl:Ontology rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"/>

  <!-- owl:Class declarations -->

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software tool or application that performs some function.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A named and published computational procedure or formula for solving a problem.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmModification">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific version or modification of an algorithm, capturing changes over time.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm Modification</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Feature">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific functionality or capability that a software tool can provide.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Feature</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A category describing the form or deployment of a software tool, such as API, Desktop application, Web application, or Library.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Software Type</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific activity or operation that a software tool can perform.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Task</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#WebService">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software type where the tool is deployed and accessible as a service over the web.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Web Service</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#UserNeed">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A requirement or desire of a user for a software tool to perform a certain task.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">User Need</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolSatisfaction">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A relationship capturing that a specific tool satisfies a user's need for a particular task.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Satisfaction</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Data">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A digital artifact or information produced or generated by a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Data</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataToolUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific instance of using a particular data artifact with a software tool to support a task.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Data Tool Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific structure or encoding standard for digital data, such as CSV, JSON, or FASTA.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Data'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolFormatSpecification">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specification that a particular software tool can accept or produce a data format, indicating whether it is for input or output.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Format Specification</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#CELFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The .cel file format, a specific data format used for microarray data.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">.cel file</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#OpenFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A data format that is openly documented, non-proprietary, and widely accessible, such as CSV or TXT.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Open Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#CSVFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The Comma-Separated Values (CSV) file format, a common open format for tabular data.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">CSV Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#OpenFormat'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#TXTFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The plain text (TXT) file format, a common open format for unstructured text data.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">TXT Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#OpenFormat'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ProprietaryFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A data format that is owned and controlled by a specific entity, often with restricted documentation or usage.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Proprietary Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ExportCapability">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A capability of a software tool to export data from a specific source format to a specific target format.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Export Capability</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersion">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific version or release of a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Version</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#HelpResource">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A resource that provides help, support, or documentation for a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Help Resource</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Documentation">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A type of help resource that provides written instructions, manuals, or guides for a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Documentation</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#HelpResource'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Developer">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">An organization, group, or individual that develops or creates a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Developer</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Collaboration">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A potential or actual collaboration activity involving developers of a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Collaboration</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

======================================================================
[24/35] CQ46: How actively developed is it?
======================================================================
<?xml version="1.0"?>
<rdf:RDF xml:base="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"
         xmlns:owl="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#"
         xmlns:rdf="http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#"
         xmlns:rdfs="http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#"
         xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#">

  <owl:Ontology rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"/>

  <!-- owl:Class declarations -->

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software tool or application that performs some function.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A named and published computational procedure or formula for solving a problem.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmModification">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific version or modification of an algorithm, capturing changes over time.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm Modification</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Feature">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific functionality or capability that a software tool can provide.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Feature</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A category describing the form or deployment of a software tool, such as API, Desktop application, Web application, or Library.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Software Type</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific activity or operation that a software tool can perform.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Task</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#WebService">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software type where the tool is deployed and accessible as a service over the web.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Web Service</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#UserNeed">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A requirement or desire of a user for a software tool to perform a certain task.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">User Need</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolSatisfaction">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">uses algorithm</rdfs:label>

  <!-- owl:Class declarations -->

  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software application or system that performs a specific function.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A named and published computational procedure or set of rules.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">An instance of a tool using a specific algorithm, which can have modifications over time.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Modification">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A change or update made to an algorithm usage instance.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Modification</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

  <!-- owl:ObjectProperty declarations -->

  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a tool to an algorithm that it employs.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">uses algorithm</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#usedByTool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links an algorithm usage instance to the tool that uses it.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">used by tool</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmUsage"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#usesAlgorithmInstance">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links an algorithm usage instance to the specific algorithm being used.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">uses algorithm instance</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmUsage"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasModification">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links an algorithm usage instance to a modification that has been applied to it.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has modification</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmUsage"/>

  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software system designed to support interoperable machine-to-machine interaction over a network, typically available via the web.</rdfs:comment>

  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Data"/>
  <owl:inverseOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#createdBy'/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#involvesData">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a data-tool usage scenario to the specific data involved.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">involves data</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataToolUsage"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Data"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#involvesTool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a data-tool usage scenario to the specific tool involved.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">involves tool</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataToolUsage"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">supports task</rdfs:label>

  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task"/>

[10/35] CQ17: What are the input and output formats for this software?
======================================================================
<?xml version="1.0"?>
<rdf:RDF xml:base="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"
         xmlns:owl="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#"
         xmlns:rdf="http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#"
         xmlns:rdfs="http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#"
         xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#">

  <owl:Ontology rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"/>

  <!-- owl:Class declarations -->

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software application or system that performs a specific function.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A named and published computational procedure or set of rules.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">An instance of a tool using a specific algorithm, which can have modifications over time.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Modification">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A change or update made to an algorithm usage instance.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Modification</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Feature">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific functionality or capability that a software tool may provide.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Feature</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A category or classification of software tools, such as API, Desktop application, etc.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Software Type</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific activity or operation that software can perform, such as rendering a GIF.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Task</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#WebService">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software system designed to support interoperable machine-to-machine interaction over a network, typically available via the web.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Web Service</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Data">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Information or content produced or processed by a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Data</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataToolUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A scenario or capability where a specific tool can be used with specific data to support a specific task.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Data Tool Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specification for the structure and encoding of data, such as JSON, CSV, or PNG.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Data Format</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

  <!-- owl:ObjectProperty declarations -->

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#usesAlgorithm">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a tool to an algorithm that it employs.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">uses algorithm</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#usedByTool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links an algorithm usage instance to the tool that uses it.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">used by tool</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmUsage"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#usesAlgorithmInstance">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links an algorithm usage instance to the specific algorithm being used.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">uses algorithm instance</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmUsage"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

======================================================================
[13/35] CQ22: Can this software export from its proprietary data format to an open format such as csv, txt?
======================================================================

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#exportsToFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links an export capability to the target data format to which data is exported.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">exports to format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ExportCapability"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataFormat"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

</rdf:RDF>

======================================================================
[16/35] CQ29: Given input x, what are the data exports for this version?
======================================================================

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software application or system that performs a specific function.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A named and published computational procedure or set of rules.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">An instance of a tool using a specific algorithm, which can have modifications over time.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Modification">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A change or update made to an algorithm usage instance.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Modification</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Feature">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific functionality or capability that a software tool may provide.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Feature</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Software Type</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Task</rdfs:label>

  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataFormat"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasValidInput">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a software tool to a specification that defines its valid input requirements.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has valid input</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ValidInputSpecification"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#specifiesFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a valid input specification to the data format that the input must conform to.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">specifies format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ValidInputSpecification"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataFormat"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasExportCapability">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a software tool to an export capability that it possesses.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has export capability</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ExportCapability"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#exportsFromFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links an export capability to the source data format from which data is exported.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">exports from format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ExportCapability"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataFormat"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#exportsToFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links an export capability to the target data format to which data is exported.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">exports to format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ExportCapability"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataFormat"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a data entity to the data format in which it is encoded or structured.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Data"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataFormat"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasLicense">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a software tool to the software license under which it is distributed.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has license</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareLicense"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasMaintenanceStatus">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a software tool to its current maintenance status.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has maintenance status</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#MaintenanceStatus"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasVersion">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a software tool to a specific version of that tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has version</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersion"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#versionHasExportCapability">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a specific tool version to an export capability that this version provides. This is a subproperty of hasExportCapability.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">version has export capability</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersion"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ExportCapability"/>
  <rdfs:subPropertyOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasExportCapability'/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#forToolVersion">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a tool version export relationship to the specific tool version it pertains to.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">for tool version</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersionExport"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersion"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#providesExport">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a tool version export relationship to the export capability that is provided.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">provides export</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersionExport"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ExportCapability"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

</rdf:RDF>

======================================================================
[17/35] CQ30: Where can I get the software?
======================================================================

<rdf:RDF xml:base="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"
         xmlns:owl="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#"
         xmlns:rdf="http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#"

  <owl:Ontology rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"/>

  <!-- owl:Class declarations -->

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software application or system that performs a specific function.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A named and published computational procedure or set of rules.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">An instance of a tool using a specific algorithm, which can have modifications over time.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Modification">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A change or update made to an algorithm usage instance.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Modification</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Feature">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific functionality or capability that a software tool may provide.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Feature</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A category or classification of software tools, such as API, Desktop application, etc.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Software Type</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific activity or operation that software can perform, such as rendering a GIF.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Task</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#WebService">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software system designed to support interoperable machine-to-machine interaction over a network, typically available via the web.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Web Service</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Data">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Information or content produced or processed by a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Data</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataToolUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A scenario or capability where a specific tool can be used with specific data to support a specific task.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Data Tool Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specification for the structure and encoding of data, such as JSON, CSV, or PNG.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Data Format</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#CelFileFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A data format for Affymetrix CEL files, which contain microarray intensity data.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">CEL File Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataFormat'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ValidInputSpecification">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specification that defines the constraints and requirements for valid input to a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Valid Input Specification</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ProprietaryDataFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A data format that is owned by a specific company or entity and may have restrictions on its use.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Proprietary Data Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataFormat'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#OpenDataFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A data format that is publicly available and can be used without proprietary restrictions, such as CSV or TXT.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Open Data Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataFormat'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#CsvFormat">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">CSV Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#OpenDataFormat'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#TxtFormat">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">TXT Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#OpenDataFormat'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ExportCapability">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Export Capability</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareLicense">

</owl:Class>

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Version Export</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareSource">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Software Source</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareLicense"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasMaintenanceStatus">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a software tool to its current maintenance status.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has maintenance status</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#MaintenanceStatus"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasVersion">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a software tool to a specific version of that tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has version</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersion"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#versionHasExportCapability">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a specific tool version to an export capability that this version provides. This is a subproperty of hasExportCapability.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">version has export capability</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersion"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ExportCapability"/>
  <rdfs:subPropertyOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasExportCapability'/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#forToolVersion">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a tool version export relationship to the specific tool version it pertains to.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">for tool version</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersionExport"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersion"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#providesExport">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a tool version export relationship to the export capability that is provided.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">provides export</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersionExport"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ExportCapability"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#availableFrom">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a software tool to the source or location from which it can be obtained.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">available from</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareSource"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

</rdf:RDF>

======================================================================
[18/35] CQ32: How do I get help?
======================================================================

<rdf:RDF xml:base="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"
         xmlns:owl="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#"
         xmlns:rdf="http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#"
         xmlns:rdfs="http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#"
         xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#">

  <owl:Ontology rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"/>

  <!-- owl:Class declarations -->

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software application or system that performs a specific function.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A named and published computational procedure or set of rules.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">An instance of a tool using a specific algorithm, which can have modifications over time.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Modification">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A change or update made to an algorithm usage instance.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Modification</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Feature">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific functionality or capability that a software tool may provide.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Feature</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A category or classification of software tools, such as API, Desktop application, etc.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Software Type</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific activity or operation that software can perform, such as rendering a GIF.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Task</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#WebService">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software system designed to support interoperable machine-to-machine interaction over a network, typically available via the web.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Web Service</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Data">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Information or content produced or processed by a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Data</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataToolUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A scenario or capability where a specific tool can be used with specific data to support a specific task.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Data Tool Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specification for the structure and encoding of data, such as JSON, CSV, or PNG.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Data Format</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#CelFileFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A data format for Affymetrix CEL files, which contain microarray intensity data.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">CEL File Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataFormat'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ValidInputSpecification">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specification that defines the constraints and requirements for valid input to a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Valid Input Specification</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ProprietaryDataFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A data format that is owned by a specific company or entity and may have restrictions on its use.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Proprietary Data Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataFormat'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#OpenDataFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A data format that is publicly available and can be used without proprietary restrictions, such as CSV or TXT.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Open Data Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataFormat'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#CsvFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The Comma-Separated Values data format, an open standard for tabular data.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">CSV Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#OpenDataFormat'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#TxtFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The plain text data format, an open standard for unstructured text data.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">TXT Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#OpenDataFormat'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ExportCapability">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A capability of a software tool to export data from one specific format to another specific format.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Export Capability</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareLicense">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A legal and distribution model that governs the use and redistribution of software.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Software License</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#OpenSourceLicense">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software license that allows the source code to be used, modified, and shared under defined terms.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Open Source License</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareLicense'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#MaintenanceStatus">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The current state of software maintenance, indicating whether it is actively developed, deprecated, or unsupported.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Maintenance Status</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ActivelyMaintained">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A maintenance status indicating that the software is currently being updated and supported by its developers.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Actively Maintained</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#MaintenanceStatus'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Version">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific release or iteration of a software tool or other entity.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Version</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersion">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific version of a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Version</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Version'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersionExport">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A relationship that links a specific tool version to an export capability it provides, capturing that this version can export from a certain format to another.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Version Export</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareSource">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A location or platform from which a software tool can be obtained, such as a website, repository, or download link.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Software Source</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#HelpResource">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A resource that provides assistance, documentation, or support for using a software tool, such as a user manual, tutorial, FAQ, or forum.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Help Resource</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#availableFrom">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a software tool to the source or location from which it can be obtained.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">available from</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareSource"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasHelpResource">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a software tool to a help resource that provides assistance or documentation for using it.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has help resource</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#HelpResource"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#availableAt">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a help resource to the software source (e.g., website, URL) where it can be accessed.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">available at</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#HelpResource"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareSource"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

</rdf:RDF>

[19/35] CQ36: Who developed it?

  <owl:Ontology rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"/>

  <!-- owl:Class declarations -->

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software application or system that performs a specific function.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A named and published computational procedure or set of rules.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">An instance of a tool using a specific algorithm, which can have modifications over time.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Modification">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A change or update made to an algorithm usage instance.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Modification</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Feature">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific functionality or capability that a software tool may provide.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Feature</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A category or classification of software tools, such as API, Desktop application, etc.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Software Type</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific activity or operation that software can perform, such as rendering a GIF.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Task</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#WebService">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software system designed to support interoperable machine-to-machine interaction over a network, typically available via the web.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Web Service</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Data">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Information or content produced or processed by a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Data</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataToolUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A scenario or capability where a specific tool can be used with specific data to support a specific task.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Data Tool Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specification for the structure and encoding of data, such as JSON, CSV, or PNG.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Data Format</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#CelFileFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A data format for Affymetrix CEL files, which contain microarray intensity data.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">CEL File Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataFormat'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ValidInputSpecification">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specification that defines the constraints and requirements for valid input to a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Valid Input Specification</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ProprietaryDataFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A data format that is owned by a specific company or entity and may have restrictions on its use.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Proprietary Data Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataFormat'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#OpenDataFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A data format that is publicly available and can be used without proprietary restrictions, such as CSV or TXT.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Open Data Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataFormat'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#CsvFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The Comma-Separated Values data format, an open standard for tabular data.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">CSV Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#OpenDataFormat'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#TxtFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The plain text data format, an open standard for unstructured text data.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">TXT Format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#OpenDataFormat'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ExportCapability">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Export Capability</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareLicense">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Software License</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#OpenSourceLicense">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Open Source License</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareLicense'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#MaintenanceStatus">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The current state of software maintenance, indicating whether it is actively developed, deprecated, or unsupported.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Maintenance Status</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ActivelyMaintained">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A maintenance status indicating that the software is currently being updated and supported by its developers.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Actively Maintained</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#MaintenanceStatus'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Version">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific release or iteration of a software tool or other entity.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Version</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersion">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific version of a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Version</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Version'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersionExport">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A relationship that links a specific tool version to an export capability it provides, capturing that this version can export from a certain format to another.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Version Export</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareSource">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A location or platform from which a software tool can be obtained, such as a website, repository, or download link.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Software Source</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#HelpResource">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A resource that provides assistance, documentation, or support for using a software tool, such as a user manual, tutorial, FAQ, or forum.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Help Resource</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Developer">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A person, team, or organization that creates or develops a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Developer</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasDeveloper">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a software tool to the developer (person, team, or organization) that created it.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has developer</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Developer"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#develops">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a developer to the software tool that they created or develop.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">develops</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Developer"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <owl:inverseOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasDeveloper'/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

</rdf:RDF>

======================================================================
[20/35] CQ37: What is the homepage of the software?
======================================================================

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software application or system that performs a specific function.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm">

</owl:Class>

</owl:Class>

</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasDeveloper">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a software tool to the developer (person, team, or organization) that created it.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has developer</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Developer"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#develops">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a developer to the software tool that they created or develop.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">develops</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Developer"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <owl:inverseOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasDeveloper'/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasHomepageSource">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a software tool to its homepage as a software source.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has homepage source</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Homepage"/>
  <rdfs:subPropertyOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#availableFrom'/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

  <!-- owl:DatatypeProperty declarations -->

<owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasHomepage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a software tool to its homepage URL as a string.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has homepage</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#xsd:string"/>
</owl:DatatypeProperty>

</rdf:RDF>

======================================================================
[21/35] CQ38: Can we collaborate with developers of software x?
======================================================================

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">provides export</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersionExport"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ExportCapability"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#availableFrom">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a software tool to the source or location from which it can be obtained.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">available from</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareSource"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasHelpResource">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a software tool to a help resource that provides assistance or documentation for using it.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has help resource</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#HelpResource"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#availableAt">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a help resource to the software source (e.g., website, URL) where it can be accessed.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">available at</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#HelpResource"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareSource"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasDeveloper">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a software tool to the developer (person, team, or organization) that created it.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has developer</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Developer"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#develops">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a developer to the software tool that they created or develop.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">develops</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Developer"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <owl:inverseOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasDeveloper'/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasHomepageSource">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a software tool to its homepage as a software source.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has homepage source</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Homepage"/>
  <rdfs:subPropertyOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#availableFrom'/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#involvesCollaborator">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a collaboration opportunity to the collaborator (person, team, or organization) seeking collaboration.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">involves collaborator</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#CollaborationOpportunity"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Collaborator"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#involvesDeveloper">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a collaboration opportunity to the developer (person, team, or organization) with whom collaboration is sought.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">involves developer</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#CollaborationOpportunity"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Developer"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#concernsTool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a collaboration opportunity to the specific software tool that is the subject of the potential collaboration.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">concerns tool</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#CollaborationOpportunity"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

  <!-- owl:DatatypeProperty declarations -->

<owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasHomepage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a software tool to its homepage URL as a string.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has homepage</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#xsd:string"/>
</owl:DatatypeProperty>

</rdf:RDF>

======================================================================
[22/35] CQ40: Which URL can I get it from?
======================================================================

</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a data entity to the data format in which it is encoded or structured.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Data"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataFormat"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasLicense">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a software tool to the software license under which it is distributed.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has license</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareLicense"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasMaintenanceStatus">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a software tool to its current maintenance status.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has maintenance status</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#MaintenanceStatus"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasVersion">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a software tool to a specific version of that tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has version</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersion"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#versionHasExportCapability">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a specific tool version to an export capability that this version provides. This is a subproperty of hasExportCapability.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">version has export capability</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersion"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ExportCapability"/>
  <rdfs:subPropertyOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasExportCapability'/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#forToolVersion">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a tool version export relationship to the specific tool version it pertains to.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">for tool version</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersionExport"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersion"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a tool version export relationship to the export capability that is provided.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">provides export</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersionExport"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ExportCapability"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasHomepageSource">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has homepage source</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Homepage"/>

</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#involvesCollaborator">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a collaboration opportunity to the collaborator (person, team, or organization) seeking collaboration.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">involves collaborator</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#CollaborationOpportunity"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Collaborator"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#involvesDeveloper">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">involves developer</rdfs:label>

  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Developer"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#concernsTool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a collaboration opportunity to the specific software tool that is the subject of the potential collaboration.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">concerns tool</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#CollaborationOpportunity"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

  <!-- owl:DatatypeProperty declarations -->

  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a software tool to its homepage URL as a string.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has homepage</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has URL</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareSource"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#xsd:string"/>
</owl:DatatypeProperty>

======================================================================
[23/35] CQ45: How long has this software been around?
======================================================================

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software application or system that performs a specific function.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A named and published computational procedure or set of rules.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">An instance of a tool using a specific algorithm, which can have modifications over time.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Modification">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A change or update made to an algorithm usage instance.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Modification</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Feature">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific functionality or capability that a software tool may provide.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Feature</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A category or classification of software tools, such as API, Desktop application, etc.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Software Type</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Task</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#WebService">

</owl:Class>

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Data Tool Usage</rdfs:label>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataFormat">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Data Format</rdfs:label>

  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a data-tool usage scenario to the specific task it supports.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">supports task</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataToolUsage"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasInputFormat">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Links a software tool to a data format that it can accept as input.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has input format</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataFormat"/>

  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DataFormat"/>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasExportCapability">

</owl:ObjectProperty>

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has creation date</rdfs:label>
